checks.name: fresh_install_first_run
checks.evidence: Browser Use rendered the real LazyCat Fusion URL after delete-data reinstall and captured the first-run registration wizard.

checks.name: project_registration
checks.evidence: Registered /project as LazyCat Fusion Demo after initializing a Git repository.

checks.name: task_board
checks.evidence: Created task FN-001 from the board, verified board view, list view, and task detail modal.

checks.name: api_smoke
checks.evidence: Verified /api/projects, /api/tasks, /api/git/status, terminal exec, and PTY create/delete.

checks.name: openrouter_free_model_configuration
checks.evidence: Verified /api/models exposed 368 OpenRouter models, then set project and FN-001 task planning/execution/validator lanes to openrouter/qwen/qwen3-coder:free.

checks.name: ai_planning_attempt
checks.evidence: Specification rebuild reached the OpenRouter free model, but qwen/qwen3-coder:free returned 429 rate limiting before PROMPT.md was generated.

checks.name: rate_limit_shutdown
checks.evidence: After recording the OpenRouter 429 behavior, set globalPause=true, enginePaused=true, and paused FN-001 to stop further automatic retries.

limitations: AI planning did not complete because OpenRouter returned 429 rate limiting for qwen/qwen3-coder:free; execution, review, and merge depend on a completed plan and were not exercised.
GitHub issue import and pull request creation were not exercised because no GitHub token was configured.
